title: sophora mollis subsp. mollis
intro: Sophora mollis subsp. mollis, also known as the Yellow Sophora or Yellow Acacia, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of China, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is valued for its potential to treat a range of health issues, including fever, cough, and skin conditions, due to its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, Sophora mollis subsp. mollis is often used to make teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues.
